data.body: PRE-FLIP GATE FAILED (correctly): flip HELD. 2 unsigned events (a claim: STATUS+EDIT) on task 2ad8 from concurrent agent session 5c2eef83 (harness 2-1-212) on an OLD pre-0ba4 worktree build. The shared store has multiple concurrent agents on MIXED builds; the flip is unsafe until ALL run post-0ba4 (527a6e730). My writers + CI + Gerrit sign; the blocker is other agents' long-lived old worktree venvs. Flip deferred until a clean validation window. The safety gate worked as designed — it caught that enforcement now would break a live writer. Epic core work DONE: signing gap found+fixed+landed (0ba4), grandfathering test landed (8d91), 4/6 tickets closed.
